title: Set up the sbt build and test task
description: Structure build.sbt, wire ScalaTest/MUnit, and run the project through sbt's task model.
body: Steps: 1. Define scalaVersion, libraryDependencies, and a test framework (ScalaTest or MUnit) in build.sbt, with test deps in the Test config. 2. Pin sbt in project/build.properties and plugins in project/plugins.sbt. 3. Write specs under src/test/scala mirroring the source packages. 4. Run sbt test (or sbt 'testOnly *Spec') and sbt compile; enable -Xfatal-warnings to fail on warnings. 5. Use sbt ~test for an incremental loop. Rollback point: before changing scalaVersion or plugin versions. Validation: a fresh sbt test compiles and runs green, and a deliberately failing assertion fails the task.
